title: Tender Steamed Indian Mushrooms Bake
description: A malty, bouncy-qq Indian dish featuring shiitake mushrooms, perfect for a sick day. This satvik-friendly recipe uses a bamboo steamer to retain the delicate flavor and aroma of the mushrooms.
instructions: Combine rice flour, coconut oil, salt, and spices in a small bowl to create a marinade.
In a large bowl, toss the sliced mushrooms with the marinade until they are evenly coated.
Steam the mushrooms in a bamboo steamer over boiling water for 8 minutes.
In a separate pan, toast the cumin seeds over medium heat until fragrant.
Add the toasted cumin seeds to the steamed mushrooms and toss to combine.
Serve the mushrooms hot with some warm rice or naan bread.
Garnish with fresh cilantro leaves if desired.
Adjust the seasoning with salt and pepper to taste.
